problem: NotebookLM 'SkillDAG' notebook (48a6afa2-97d8-44f4-8a41-c87d2ea0b650) may define skill dependency graphs, pipeline routing, and gate nodes not yet mapped in agent-rules after Geometry and RAG Anatomy incorporation slices.
solution: Extract and gate SkillDAG sources; document SKILLDAG_MAP; extend registry with optional DAG metadata and validation script; add wiki concept and research-gate grill reference—without duplicating Geometry SkillRAE or RAG Anatomy harness docs, and without citing UNVERIFIED benchmarks in rules.

user_stories.description: Operator has SKILLDAG_MAP.md linking DAG concepts to registry, skill_rerank, skill_decompose, and LifeHarness L2.
Registry supports optional depends_on / pipeline_group / parallel_safe with skill_dag_validate.py cycle detection.
notebooklm-research-gate lists SkillDAG grill prompts for re-extraction.
Wiki concept SkillDAG is linked from index/log with notebooklm provenance.
Optional skill-dag-router skill exists only if delta doc confirms true gap vs existing skill_rerank and pipelines table.

technical_decisions.decision: Defer all incorporation until skilldag_gate_report.json returns GO for P0 procedural claims.
technical_decisions.rationale: NotebookLM content is untrusted until research gate; staged 2026-06-05 without extraction on source machine.

technical_decisions.decision: Do not reopen prd_geometry_incorporation.json or prd_rag_anatomy_incorporation.json issues.
technical_decisions.rationale: Both execution_chain.status complete; SkillDAG is third notebook slice.

technical_decisions.decision: SkillRAE subunit graphs (skill_decompose) and skill-to-skill DAG are distinct concepts until notebook proves otherwise.
technical_decisions.rationale: Repo already has SkillRAE-lite; delta doc must disambiguate before registry schema change.

technical_decisions.decision: MCP ask_question with notebooklm_skilldag_grill_prompts.md is canonical extraction path; CLI export-chat is supplemental.
technical_decisions.rationale: Default notebooklm_grill_playwright.py embeds RAG Anatomy questions only; skilldag script uses dedicated prompts.

issues.title: Extend notebooklm-research-gate reference_files with SkillDAG grill prompts
Registry optional DAG metadata + skill_task_mapping regenerate
Batch skill_decompose compare subunit vs dependency graph
skilldag_vs_geometry_rag cross-notebook dedup section in delta
